mapper.sql: SELECT A.STD_ID -- 중간고사 미평가 , NVL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN CASE WHEN QUIZ.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN CASE WHEN ASMNT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN CASE WHEN FORUM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE QUIZ ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_ID AND QUIZ.DELYN = 'N' AND QUIZ.STARE_CNT > 0 AND QUIZ.EVLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN ASMNT ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID AND ASMNT.DELYN = 'N' AND ASMNT.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND ASMNT.EVLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP FORUM ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND FORUM.DELYN = 'N' AND FORUM.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND QUIZ.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND ASMNT.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND FORUM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.EXAM_TYCD IN ('QUIZ', 'ASMNT', 'FORUM') AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ), 0) + NVL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN QUIZ.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN ASMNT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN FORUM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE QUIZ ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_ID AND QUIZ.DELYN = 'N' AND QUIZ.STARE_CNT > 0 AND QUIZ.EVLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN ASMNT ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID AND ASMNT.DELYN = 'N' AND ASMNT.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND ASMNT.EVLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP FORUM ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND FORUM.DELYN = 'N' AND FORUM.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND QUIZ.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND ASMNT.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND FORUM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y') ), 0) AS MID_NO_EVAL_CNT -- 기말고사 미평가 , NVL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN CASE WHEN QUIZ.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN CASE WHEN ASMNT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN CASE WHEN FORUM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE QUIZ ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_ID AND QUIZ.DELYN = 'N' AND QUIZ.STARE_CNT > 0 AND QUIZ.EVLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN ASMNT ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID AND ASMNT.DELYN = 'N' AND ASMNT.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND ASMNT.EVLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP FORUM ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND FORUM.DELYN = 'N' AND FORUM.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND QUIZ.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND ASMNT.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND FORUM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.EXAM_TYCD IN ('QUIZ', 'ASMNT', 'FORUM') AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ), 0) + NVL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN QUIZ.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN ASMNT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN FORUM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE QUIZ ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_ID AND QUIZ.DELYN = 'N' AND QUIZ.STARE_CNT > 0 AND QUIZ.EVLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN ASMNT ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID AND ASMNT.DELYN = 'N' AND ASMNT.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND ASMNT.EVLYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP FORUM ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND FORUM.DELYN = 'N' AND FORUM.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND QUIZ.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND ASMNT.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND FORUM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y') ), 0) AS LAST_NO_EVAL_CNT -- 과제 미평가 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN BB ON AA.ASMT_ID = BB.ASMT_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND BB.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.ASMT_CTGRCD NOT IN ('EXAM', 'SUBS') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) AS ASMNT_NO_EVAL_CNT -- 토론 미평가 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AA JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP BB ON AA.DSCS_ID = BB.DSCS_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND BB.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.DSCS_TYCD NOT IN ('EXAM', 'SUBS') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) AS FORUM_NO_EVAL_CNT -- 퀴즈 미평가 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE CC ON AA.EXAM_ID = CC.EXAM_ID AND CC.DELYN = 'N' AND CC.STARE_CNT > 0 AND CC.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND CC.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD NOT IN ('EXAM', 'SUBS') AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) AS QUIZ_NO_EVAL_CNT -- 수시 미평가 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE CC ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = CC.EXAM_ID AND CC.DELYN = 'N' AND CC.STARE_CNT > 0 AND CC.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND CC.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' -- 수시평가 퀴즈 AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) AS TEST_NO_EVAL_CNT -- 설문 미평가 , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY AA JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.SRVY_ID = BB.SRVY_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP CC ON AA.SRVY_ID = CC.SRVY_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND SRVY_ID = CC.SRVY_ID) AND CC.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND CC.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) AS RESCH_NO_EVAL_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N'

SELECT A.STD_ID , A.TKEXAM_TYCD , CASE WHEN EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND ACQS_TOT_SCR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'Y' WHEN EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND SDTTM IS NOT NULL) THEN 'Y' WHEN EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND NVL(SBMSN_STSCD, 'NO') IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE')) THEN 'Y' WHEN EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS JOIN_YN FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , B.EXAM_ID , B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID , B.TKEXAM_TYCD , CASE WHEN EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN NVL((SELECT REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N'), 'N') = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN 'QUIZ' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN 'ASMNT' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN 'FORUM' ELSE 'EXAM' END ELSE 'EXAM' END WHEN EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN 'QUIZ' WHEN EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN 'ASMNT' WHEN EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN 'FORUM' END AS EXAM_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN ( SELECT B.SBJCT_ID , A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID , A.EXAM_TYCD , A.TKEXAM_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD IN ('M', 'L') ) B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) A

SELECT X.STD_ID , X.SBJCT_ID , X.SCR_STSCD , X.SCR_GRDCD , X.DEPTNM , X.USER_ID , X.SCYR , X.MOBILE_NO AS USER_MOBILE_NO , X.EMAIL AS USER_EMAIL , X.USERNM , X.SCHREG_GBN , X.SCHREG_GBN_CD , NVL((SELECT CHGBFR_SCR FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY WHERE SBJCT_ID = X.SBJCT_ID AND STD_ID = X.STD_ID), X.TOT_SCR) AS CHGBFR_SCR , X.TOT_SCR , X.LST_SCR , X.LESSON_SCORE , X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO , ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.LESSON_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.LESSON_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS LESSON_SCORE_AVG , X.LESSON_ITEM_ID , X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE , X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG , X.MIDDLE_TEST_ITEM_ID , X.LAST_TEST_SCORE , X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.LAST_TEST_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.LAST_TEST_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG , X.LAST_TEST_ITEM_ID , X.TEST_SCORE , X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO , ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.TEST_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.TEST_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS TEST_SCORE_AVG , X.TEST_ITEM_ID , X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE , X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO , ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG , X.ASSIGNMENT_ITEM_ID , X.FORUM_SCORE , X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO , ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.FORUM_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.FORUM_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS FORUM_SCORE_AVG , X.FORUM_ITEM_ID , X.QUIZ_SCORE , X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO , ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.QUIZ_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.QUIZ_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS QUIZ_SCORE_AVG , X.QUIZ_ITEM_ID , X.RESH_SCORE , X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO , ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.RESH_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.RESH_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS RESH_SCORE_AVG , X.RESH_ITEM_ID , X.ETC_SCORE , X.SCR_MEMO , ROUND( ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.LESSON_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.LESSON_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) + ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) + ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.LAST_TEST_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.LAST_TEST_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) + ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.TEST_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.TEST_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) + ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) + ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.FORUM_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.FORUM_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) + ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.QUIZ_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.QUIZ_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) + ROUND((CAST(CASE WHEN X.RESH_SCORE < 0 THEN 0 ELSE X.RESH_SCORE END AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) , 2) AS CAL_TOT_SCR , X.MIDDLE_TEST_USE_YN , X.LAST_TEST_USE_YN , X.MIDDLE_TEST_NO_YN_2 , X.LAST_TEST_NO_YN_2 FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , C.SBJCT_ID , MAX(A.SCR_STSCD) AS SCR_STSCD , MAX(A.SCR_GRDCD) AS SCR_GRDCD , MAX(E.DEPTNM) AS DEPTNM , MAX(E.USER_ID) AS USER_ID , MAX(NVL(SCYR, '-')) AS SCYR , MAX(E.USERNM) AS USERNM , MAX(E.SCHREG_GBN) AS SCHREG_GBN , MAX(E.SCHREG_GBN_CD) AS SCHREG_GBN_CD , MAX(E.MOBILE_NO) AS MOBILE_NO , MAX(E.EMAIL) AS EMAIL , MAX(A.TOT_SCR) AS TOT_SCR , MAX(A.LST_SCR) AS LST_SCR , MAX(NVL(A.ADTN_SCR, 0)) AS ETC_SCORE , MAX(A.SCR_MEMO) AS SCR_MEMO
, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN B.ACQS_SCR ELSE 0 END) AS LESSON_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN B.ACQS_SCR ELSE 0 END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN B.ACQS_SCR ELSE 0 END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN B.ACQS_SCR ELSE 0 END) AS TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN B.ACQS_SCR ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN B.ACQS_SCR ELSE 0 END) AS FORUM_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN B.ACQS_SCR ELSE 0 END) AS QUIZ_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN B.ACQS_SCR ELSE 0 END) AS RESH_SCORE
, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS LESSON_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS FORUM_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS QUIZ_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS RESH_SCORE
, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS LESSON_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS LAST_TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS ASSIGNMENT_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS FORUM_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS FORUM_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS QUIZ_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS RESH_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS RESH_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' AND NVL(C.MRK_RFLTRT, 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_USE_YN , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' AND NVL(C.MRK_RFLTRT, 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END) AS LAST_TEST_USE_YN , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' AND NVL(C.MRK_RFLTRT, 0) > 0 AND B.ACQS_SCR = -1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_NO_YN_2 , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' AND NVL(C.MRK_RFLTRT, 0) > 0 AND B.ACQS_SCR = -1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS LAST_TEST_NO_YN_2 FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON (D.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND D.AUDITYN = 'N' AND D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON (D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID) GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ) X WHERE 1=1
AND ( X.DEPTNM LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR X.USER_ID LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR X.USERNM LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
AND X.STD_ID IN (
#{stdNos}
)
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : selectOverallTotalCnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON (D.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND D.AUDITYN = 'N' AND D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON (D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID) GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ) A

/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectOverallScoreDtl 설 명 : */
SELECT X.STD_ID, X.SBJCT_ID, X.SCR_STSCD, X.SCR_GRDCD, UI.DEPTNM, X.USER_ID, UI.MOBILE_NO AS USER_MOBILE_NO, UI.EMAIL AS USER_EMAIL, UI.USERNM, X.TOT_SCR, X.LST_SCR, X.LESSON_SCORE, X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO, ROUND(NVL(X.LESSON_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO, 0), 2) AS LESSON_SCORE_AVG, X.LESSON_ITEM_ID, X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE, X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, ROUND(NVL(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, 0), 2) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG, X.MIDDLE_TEST_ITEM_ID, X.LAST_TEST_SCORE, X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, ROUND(NVL(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, 0), 2) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG, X.LAST_TEST_ITEM_ID, X.TEST_SCORE, X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO, ROUND(NVL(X.TEST_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO, 0), 2) AS TEST_SCORE_AVG, X.TEST_ITEM_ID, X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE, X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO, ROUND(NVL(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO, 0), 2) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG, X.ASSIGNMENT_ITEM_ID, X.FORUM_SCORE, X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO, ROUND(NVL(X.FORUM_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO, 0), 2) AS FORUM_SCORE_AVG, X.FORUM_ITEM_ID, X.QUIZ_SCORE, X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO, ROUND(NVL(X.QUIZ_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO, 0), 2) AS QUIZ_SCORE_AVG, X.QUIZ_ITEM_ID, X.RESH_SCORE, X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO, ROUND(NVL(X.RESH_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO, 0), 2) AS RESH_SCORE_AVG, X.RESH_ITEM_ID, X.ETC_SCORE, X.SCR_MEMO, ROUND( NVL(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, 0) + NVL(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, 0) + NVL(X.TEST_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO, 0) + NVL(X.LESSON_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO, 0) + NVL(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO, 0) + NVL(X.FORUM_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO, 0) + NVL(X.QUIZ_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO, 0) + NVL(X.RESH_SCORE, 0)/100 * NVL(X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO, 0) , 2) AS AVG_SCORE, X.EXCH_SCR_MID_TEST, X.EXCH_SCR_LAST_TEST, X.EXCH_SCR_ASMNT, X.DRVTN_SCR_LRN_PRGRT, X.EXCH_SCR_FORUM, X.EXCH_SCR_TEST, X.EXCH_SCR_QUIZ, X.EXCH_SCR_RESH, X.EXCH_TOT_SCR FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID, A.SCR_STSCD, A.SCR_GRDCD, A.TOT_SCR, A.LST_SCR, A.ADTN_SCR AS ETC_SCORE, A.SCR_MEMO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN GREATEST(NVL(B.ACQS_SCR, 0), 0) END) AS LESSON_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS LESSON_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN GREATEST(NVL(B.ACQS_SCR, 0), 0) END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN GREATEST(NVL(B.ACQS_SCR, 0), 0) END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS LAST_TEST_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN GREATEST(NVL(B.ACQS_SCR, 0), 0) END) AS TEST_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS TEST_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS TEST_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN GREATEST(NVL(B.ACQS_SCR, 0), 0) END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS ASSIGNMENT_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN GREATEST(NVL(B.ACQS_SCR, 0), 0) END) AS FORUM_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS FORUM_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS FORUM_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN GREATEST(NVL(B.ACQS_SCR, 0), 0) END) AS QUIZ_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS QUIZ_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN GREATEST(NVL(B.ACQS_SCR, 0), 0) END) AS RESH_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS RESH_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS RESH_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN A.DRVTN_SCR_LRN_PRGRT END) AS DRVTN_SCR_LRN_PRGRT, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN A.EXCH_SCR_MID_TEST END) AS EXCH_SCR_MID_TEST, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN A.EXCH_SCR_LAST_TEST END) AS EXCH_SCR_LAST_TEST, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN A.EXCH_SCR_TEST END) AS EXCH_SCR_TEST, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN A.EXCH_SCR_ASMNT END) AS EXCH_SCR_ASMNT, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN A.EXCH_SCR_FORUM END) AS EXCH_SCR_FORUM, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN A.EXCH_SCR_QUIZ END) AS EXCH_SCR_QUIZ, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN A.EXCH_SCR_RESH END) AS EXCH_SCR_RESH, A.EXCH_TOT_SCR, S.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S ON S.STD_ID = A.STD_ID WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID, A.SCR_STSCD, A.SCR_GRDCD, A.TOT_SCR, A.LST_SCR, A.ADTN_SCR, A.SCR_MEMO, A.EXCH_TOT_SCR, S.USER_ID ) X JOIN TB_LMS_USR UI ON X.USER_ID = UI.USER_ID
mapper.sql: SELECT XX.SBJCT_ID , XX.STD_ID , ( CASE WHEN LESSON_SCORE_AVG > 0 THEN ROUND(LESSON_SCORE_AVG + MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG + LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG + TEST_SCORE_AVG + ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG + FORUM_SCORE_AVG + QUIZ_SCORE_AVG + RESH_SCORE_AVG, 2) ELSE 0 END ) AS CAL_TOT_SCR FROM ( SELECT X.SBJCT_ID , X.STD_ID , ROUND((CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS LESSON_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS FORUM_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS QUIZ_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.RESH_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS RESH_SCORE_AVG FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , C.SBJCT_ID , MAX(A.SCR_STSCD) AS SCR_STSCD , MAX(A.SCR_GRDCD) AS SCR_GRDCD , MAX(E.DEPTNM) AS DEPTNM , MAX(E.USER_ID) AS USER_ID , MAX(NVL(SCYR, '-')) AS SCYR , MAX(E.USERNM) AS USERNM , MAX(E.SCHREG_GBN) AS SCHREG_GBN , MAX(E.SCHREG_GBN_CD) AS SCHREG_GBN_CD , MAX(E.MOBILE_NO) AS MOBILE_NO , MAX(E.EMAIL) AS EMAIL , MAX(A.TOT_SCR) AS TOT_SCR , MAX(A.LST_SCR) AS LST_SCR , MAX(A.ADTN_SCR) AS ETC_SCORE , MAX(A.SCR_MEMO) AS SCR_MEMO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS LESSON_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS LESSON_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS LAST_TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS ASSIGNMENT_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS FORUM_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS FORUM_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS FORUM_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS QUIZ_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS QUIZ_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS RESH_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS RESH_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS RESH_ITEM_ID FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON (D.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND D.AUDITYN = 'N' AND D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON (D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID) WHERE E.SCHREG_GBN_CD IN ('01', '02', '20') GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ) X ) XX
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectRankList 설 명 : 산출점수 순위 목록 조회 */ SELECT XXX.* , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC, XXX.STD_ID) AS RNO FROM (
) XXX
mapper.update:
/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.updateRankList 설 명 : 산출점수 순위 수정 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A USING( SELECT XXX.STD_ID , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC, XXX.STD_ID) AS RNO FROM (
) XXX ) B ON (A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.RNK = B.MARK_RANK , A.RNK_QUOTA = #{rankRCnt} , A.RNK_TRGTYN = 'Y'
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectDenseRankMax 설 명 : 입력 행의 순위 조회 */ SELECT MAX(YR.RNO) AS RNO , MAX(YR.MARK_RANK) AS MARK_RANK FROM ( SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY Y.RNO DESC) AS MARK_DENSE_RANK , Y.MARK_RANK , Y.RNO FROM ( SELECT XXX.SBJCT_ID , XXX.STD_ID , XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC, XXX.STD_ID) AS RNO FROM (
) XXX ) Y WHERE Y.RNO = #{rcnt} ORDER BY Y.RNO DESC ) YR

/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectDenseRankMaxForRank 설 명 : 순위의 마지막 행 번호 조회 */ SELECT MAX(YR.RNO) AS RNO , MAX(YR.MARK_RANK) AS MARK_RANK FROM ( SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY Y.RNO DESC) AS MARK_DENSE_RANK , Y.MARK_RANK , Y.RNO FROM ( SELECT XXX.SBJCT_ID , XXX.STD_ID , XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC, XXX.STD_ID) AS RNO FROM (
) XXX ) Y WHERE Y.MARK_RANK = #{grade} ORDER BY Y.RNO DESC ) YR

/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectDenseRankMaxForRankPlus 설 명 : 행 + 1 의 순위 조회 */ SELECT MAX(YR.MARK_RANK) AS MARK_RANK FROM ( SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY Y.RNO DESC) AS MARK_DENSE_RANK , Y.MARK_RANK , Y.RNO FROM ( SELECT XXX.SBJCT_ID , XXX.STD_ID , XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC, XXX.STD_ID) AS RNO FROM (
) XXX ) Y WHERE Y.RNO = #{rcnt} ORDER BY Y.RNO DESC ) YR

/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectRankRcnt 설 명 : 행 이하 동점자 수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS RNK_QUOTA FROM ( SELECT XXX.SBJCT_ID , XXX.STD_ID , XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC, XXX.STD_ID) AS RNO FROM (
) XXX ) Y WHERE Y.MARK_RANK = #{markRank} AND Y.RNO > #{rno}

/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectMrksRankTemp 설 명 : 순위의 동점자 마지막 행 번호 */ SELECT MAX(YR.RNO) AS MARK_RANK_TEMP FROM ( SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY Y.RNO DESC) AS MARK_DENSE_RANK , Y.RNO FROM ( SELECT XXX.SBJCT_ID , XXX.STD_ID , XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC, XXX.STD_ID) AS RNO FROM (
) XXX ) Y WHERE Y.MARK_RANK = #{markRank} ORDER BY Y.RNO DESC ) YR

/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectMrksNotRankList 설 명 : 출결 F 대상 목록 */ SELECT Y.* FROM ( SELECT XXX.SBJCT_ID , XXX.STD_ID , XXX.RNK , XXX.RNK_QUOTA , XXX.RNK_TRGTYN , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , IFNULL(XXX.LESSON_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS LESSON_SCORE_AVG , IFNULL(XXX.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG , IFNULL(XXX.LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG , IFNULL(XXX.TEST_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS TEST_SCORE_AVG , IFNULL(XXX.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG , IFNULL(XXX.FORUM_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS FORUM_SCORE_AVG , IFNULL(XXX.QUIZ_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS QUIZ_SCORE_AVG , IFNULL(XXX.RESH_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS RESH_SCORE_AVG , IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) AS CAL_TOT_SCR , IFNULL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) + IFNULL(XXX.ETC_SCORE, 0) AS FL_EXCH_SCR FROM ( SELECT XX.SBJCT_ID , XX.STD_ID , XX.RNK , XX.RNK_QUOTA , XX.RNK_TRGTYN , XX.LESSON_SCORE_AVG , XX.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG , XX.LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG , XX.TEST_SCORE_AVG , XX.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG , XX.FORUM_SCORE_AVG , XX.QUIZ_SCORE_AVG , XX.RESH_SCORE_AVG , XX.ETC_SCORE , XX.SCHREG_GBN_CD , ROUND(XX.LESSON_SCORE_AVG + XX.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG + XX.LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG + XX.TEST_SCORE_AVG + XX.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG + XX.FORUM_SCORE_AVG + XX.QUIZ_SCORE_AVG + XX.RESH_SCORE_AVG, 2) AS CAL_TOT_SCR FROM ( SELECT X.SBJCT_ID , X.STD_ID , X.RNK , X.RNK_QUOTA , X.RNK_TRGTYN , X.SCHREG_GBN_CD , ROUND((CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2))/100) * CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS LESSON_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2))/100) * CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2))/100) * CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.TEST_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2))/100) * CAST(X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2))/100) * CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2))/100) * CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS FORUM_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2))/100) * CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS QUIZ_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.RESH_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2))/100) * CAST(X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS RESH_SCORE_AVG , ETC_SCORE FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , C.SBJCT_ID , A.RNK , A.RNK_QUOTA , A.RNK_TRGTYN , A.SCR_STSCD , A.SCR_GRDCD , E.DEPTNM , E.USER_ID , IFNULL(SCYR,'-') AS SCYR , E.USERNM , E.SCHREG_GBN , E.SCHREG_GBN_CD , E.MOBILE_NO , E.EMAIL , A.TOT_SCR , A.LST_SCR , A.ADTN_SCR AS ETC_SCORE , A.SCR_MEMO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1', IF(B.ACQS_SCR < 0, 0, B.ACQS_SCR), '-')) AS LESSON_SCORE , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1', C.MRK_RFLTRT , '-')) AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1', B.SCR_ITM_ID, '-')) AS LESSON_ITEM_ID , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2', IF(B.ACQS_SCR < 0, 0, B.ACQS_SCR), '-')) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2', C.MRK_RFLTRT, '-')) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2', B.SCR_ITM_ID, '-')) AS MIDDLE_TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3', IF(B.ACQS_SCR < 0, 0, B.ACQS_SCR), '-')) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3', C.MRK_RFLTRT, '-')) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3', B.SCR_ITM_ID, '-')) AS LAST_TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4', IF(B.ACQS_SCR < 0, 0, B.ACQS_SCR), '-')) AS TEST_SCORE , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4', C.MRK_RFLTRT, '-')) AS TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4', B.SCR_ITM_ID, '-')) AS TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5', IF(B.ACQS_SCR < 0, 0, B.ACQS_SCR), '-')) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5', C.MRK_RFLTRT, '-')) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5', B.SCR_ITM_ID, '-')) AS ASSIGNMENT_ITEM_ID , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6', IF(B.ACQS_SCR < 0, 0, B.ACQS_SCR), '-')) AS FORUM_SCORE , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6', C.MRK_RFLTRT, '-')) AS FORUM_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6', B.SCR_ITM_ID, '-')) AS FORUM_ITEM_ID , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7', IF(B.ACQS_SCR < 0, 0, B.ACQS_SCR), '-')) AS QUIZ_SCORE , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7', C.MRK_RFLTRT, '-')) AS QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7', B.SCR_ITM_ID, '-')) AS QUIZ_ITEM_ID , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8', IF(B.ACQS_SCR < 0, 0, B.ACQS_SCR), '-')) AS RESH_SCORE , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8', C.MRK_RFLTRT, '-')) AS RESH_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(IF(C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8', B.SCR_ITM_ID, '-')) AS RESH_ITEM_ID FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON (D.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND D.AUDITYN = 'N' AND D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON (D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID) GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ) X WHERE 1=1 AND X.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) XX WHERE ((XX.LESSON_SCORE_AVG = 0 AND 1 != 1) OR XX.SCHREG_GBN_CD NOT IN ('01', '02', '20')) ) XXX ) Y

/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectScoreMustF 설 명 : 출결 F 대상자 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT XXX.SBJCT_ID , XXX.STD_ID , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) DESC) AS MARK_RANK , NVL(XXX.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG , NVL(XXX.LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG , NVL(XXX.LESSON_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS LESSON_SCORE_AVG , NVL(XXX.TEST_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS TEST_SCORE_AVG , NVL(XXX.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG , NVL(XXX.FORUM_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS FORUM_SCORE_AVG , NVL(XXX.QUIZ_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS QUIZ_SCORE_AVG , NVL(XXX.RESH_SCORE_AVG, 0) AS RESH_SCORE_AVG , NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) AS CAL_TOT_SCR , NVL(XXX.CAL_TOT_SCR, 0) + NVL(XXX.ETC_SCORE, 0) AS FL_EXCH_SCR FROM ( SELECT XX.SBJCT_ID , XX.STD_ID , XX.LESSON_SCORE_AVG , XX.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG , XX.LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG , XX.TEST_SCORE_AVG , XX.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG , XX.FORUM_SCORE_AVG , XX.QUIZ_SCORE_AVG , XX.RESH_SCORE_AVG , XX.ETC_SCORE , ROUND( XX.LESSON_SCORE_AVG + XX.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG + XX.LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG + XX.TEST_SCORE_AVG + XX.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG + XX.FORUM_SCORE_AVG + XX.QUIZ_SCORE_AVG + XX.RESH_SCORE_AVG , 2) AS CAL_TOT_SCR FROM ( SELECT X.SBJCT_ID , X.STD_ID , ROUND((CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS LESSON_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS TEST_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS FORUM_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS QUIZ_SCORE_AVG , ROUND((CAST(X.RESH_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS RESH_SCORE_AVG , X.ETC_SCORE FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , C.SBJCT_ID , MAX(A.SCR_STSCD) AS SCR_STSCD , MAX(A.SCR_GRDCD) AS SCR_GRDCD , MAX(E.DEPTNM) AS DEPTNM , MAX(E.USER_ID) AS USER_ID , MAX(NVL(SCYR, '-')) AS SCYR , MAX(E.USERNM) AS USERNM , MAX(E.SCHREG_GBN) AS SCHREG_GBN , MAX(E.SCHREG_GBN_CD) AS SCHREG_GBN_CD , MAX(E.MOBILE_NO) AS MOBILE_NO , MAX(E.EMAIL) AS EMAIL , MAX(A.TOT_SCR) AS TOT_SCR , MAX(A.LST_SCR) AS LST_SCR , MAX(A.ADTN_SCR) AS ETC_SCORE , MAX(A.SCR_MEMO) AS SCR_MEMO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS LESSON_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS LESSON_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS LAST_TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS TEST_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS TEST_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS TEST_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS ASSIGNMENT_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS FORUM_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS FORUM_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS FORUM_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS QUIZ_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS QUIZ_ITEM_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END ELSE 0 END) AS RESH_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE 0 END) AS RESH_SCORE_RATIO , MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID ELSE '-' END) AS RESH_ITEM_ID FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON (D.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND D.AUDITYN = 'N' AND D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON (D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID AND E.SCHREG_GBN_CD IN ('01', '02', '20')) GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ) X WHERE 1=1 AND X.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) XX WHERE XX.LESSON_SCORE_AVG = 0 ) XXX ) Y

/* SQL ID : ScoreOverallDAO.selectStdDetailScore 설 명 : */
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY X.USERNM ASC) AS LINE_NO, X.*, ROUND((CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LESSON_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS LESSON_SCORE_AVG, ROUND((CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_AVG, ROUND((CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_AVG, ROUND((CAST(X.TEST_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS TEST_SCORE_AVG, ROUND((CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_AVG, ROUND((CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.FORUM_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS FORUM_SCORE_AVG, ROUND((CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS QUIZ_SCORE_AVG, ROUND((CAST(X.RESH_SCORE AS NUMBER(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(X.RESH_SCORE_RATIO AS NUMBER(5, 2)), 2) AS RESH_SCORE_AVG FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID, A.SCR_STSCD, A.SCR_GRDCD, E.DEPTNM, E.USER_ID, '-' AS SCYR, E.USERNM, E.SCHREG_GBN, E.SCHREG_GBN_CD, E.MOBILE_NO, E.EMAIL, MAX(A.TOT_SCR) AS TOT_SCR, MAX(A.LST_SCR) AS LST_SCR, MAX(A.ADTN_SCR) AS ETC_SCORE, MAX(A.SCR_MEMO) AS SCR_MEMO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END END) AS LESSON_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS LESSON_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS MIDDLE_TEST_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS LAST_TEST_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END END) AS TEST_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS TEST_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS TEST_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS ASSIGNMENT_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END END) AS FORUM_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS FORUM_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS FORUM_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END END) AS QUIZ_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS QUIZ_ITEM_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END END) AS RESH_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN C.MRK_RFLTRT END) AS RESH_SCORE_RATIO, MAX(CASE WHEN C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8' THEN B.SCR_ITM_ID END) AS RESH_ITEM_ID, MAX(A.DRVTN_SCR_LRN_PRGRT) AS DRVTN_SCR_LRN_PRGRT, MAX(A.EXCH_SCR_MID_TEST) AS EXCH_SCR_MID_TEST, MAX(A.EXCH_SCR_LAST_TEST) AS EXCH_SCR_LAST_TEST, MAX(A.EXCH_SCR_TEST) AS EXCH_SCR_TEST, MAX(A.EXCH_SCR_ASMNT) AS EXCH_SCR_ASMNT, MAX(A.EXCH_SCR_FORUM) AS EXCH_SCR_FORUM, MAX(A.EXCH_SCR_QUIZ) AS EXCH_SCR_QUIZ, MAX(A.EXCH_SCR_RESH) AS EXCH_SCR_RESH, MAX(A.EXCH_TOT_SCR) AS EXCH_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON D.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND D.AUDITYN = 'N' AND D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID, A.SCR_STSCD, A.SCR_GRDCD, E.DEPTNM, E.USER_ID, E.USERNM, E.SCHREG_GBN, E.SCHREG_GBN_CD, E.MOBILE_NO, E.EMAIL ) X WHERE X.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND X.USER_ID IS NOT NULL AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo} ) ORDER BY LINE_NO ASC
/* SQL ID : selectCreCrsEval 설 명 : */ SELECT MRK_EVL_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_CRE_CRS_EVAL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : selectScoreRelConf 설 명 : */ SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN SMRK_GRDCD = 'A+' THEN END_PRCNTL ELSE 0 END ) AS INIT_RATIO_A1 , MAX(CASE WHEN SMRK_GRDCD = 'A' THEN END_PRCNTL ELSE 0 END ) AS INIT_RATIO_A2 , MAX(CASE WHEN SMRK_GRDCD = 'B' THEN END_PRCNTL ELSE 0 END ) AS INIT_RATIO_B FROM MRK_RLTV_EVL_CRTRRT WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY ORG_ID

/* SQL ID : selectStdTotCnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS TOT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON (B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID) WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND B.SCHREG_GBN_CD IN ('01','02','20')

/* SQL ID : selectScoreRel 설 명 : */ SELECT SBJCT_ID , CALC_TYCD , RATIO_A1 , CNT_A1 , RATIO_A2 , CNT_A2 , RATIO_B1 , CNT_B1 , RATIO_B2 , CNT_B2 , RATIO_C1 , CNT_C1 , RATIO_C2 , CNT_C2 , RATIO_D1 , CNT_D1 , RATIO_D2 , CNT_D2 , RATIO_F , CNT_F FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_MRK_EVLRT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : selectOverallStdList 설 명 : */ SELECT A.STD_ID , C.SBJCT_ID , A.SCR_STSCD , A.TOT_SCR , A.LST_SCR , A.SCR_GRDCD , A.ADTN_SCR AS ETC_SCORE , (CASE WHEN A.TOT_SCR >= 95.99 AND A.TOT_SCR <= 100 THEN 'A+' WHEN A.TOT_SCR >= 90.99 AND A.TOT_SCR <= 94.99 THEN 'A' WHEN A.TOT_SCR >= 85.99 AND A.TOT_SCR <= 89.99 THEN 'B+' WHEN A.TOT_SCR >= 80 AND A.TOT_SCR <= 84.99 THEN 'B' WHEN A.TOT_SCR >= 75.99 AND A.TOT_SCR <= 79.99 THEN 'C+' WHEN A.TOT_SCR >= 70 AND A.TOT_SCR <= 74.99 THEN 'C' WHEN A.TOT_SCR >= 65.99 AND A.TOT_SCR <= 69.99 THEN 'D+' WHEN A.TOT_SCR >= 60 AND A.TOT_SCR <= 64.99 THEN 'D' WHEN A.TOT_SCR < 60 THEN 'F' END) AS SCORE_GRADE2 FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ORDER BY A.LST_SCR + A.ADTN_SCR DESC
/* SQL ID : selectOverallScoreOpenYn 설 명 : */ SELECT MRK_OYN AS scoreOpenYn FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : chartScoreList 설 명 : */ SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCR BETWEEN 0 AND 50 THEN 1 END),0) AS SCORE50 , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCR BETWEEN 51 AND 60 THEN 1 END),0) AS SCORE60 , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCR BETWEEN 61 AND 70 THEN 1 END),0) AS SCORE70 , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCR BETWEEN 71 AND 80 THEN 1 END),0) AS SCORE80 , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCR BETWEEN 81 AND 90 THEN 1 END),0) AS SCORE90 , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TOT_SCR BETWEEN 91 AND 100 THEN 1 END),0) AS SCORE100 , NVL(COUNT(1),0) AS STD_COUNT , NVL(MAX(MY_SCORE.MY_FINAL_SCORE), 0) AS MY_FINAL_SCORE FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT TLSS CROSS JOIN ( SELECT TOT_SCR AS MY_FINAL_SCORE FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) MY_SCORE WHERE TLSS.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N')

/* SQL ID : listScoreItemConfNoZero 설 명 : */ SELECT SCR_ITM_ID , SBJCT_ID , MRK_ITM_SEQ , MRK_TYCD , MRK_ITMNM , MRK_ITM_EXPLN , NVL(MRK_RFLTRT, 0) as MRK_RFLTRT , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ORDER BY MRK_ITM_SEQ ASC

/* SQL ID : avgScorebyItem 설 명 : */ SELECT NVL(AVG(TLSSI.ACQS_SCR),0) AS AVG_SCORE , NVL(MAX(MY_ITEM.ACQS_SCR), 0) AS ACQS_SCR FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM TLSSI CROSS JOIN ( SELECT ACQS_SCR FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM WHERE SCR_ITM_ID = #{scoreItemId} AND STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) MY_ITEM WHERE TLSSI.SCR_ITM_ID = #{scoreItemId}

/* SQL ID : selectScoreZero 설 명 : */ SELECT STD_ID FROM (
) A WHERE (MID_NO_EVAL_CNT + LAST_NO_EVAL_CNT + ASMNT_NO_EVAL_CNT + FORUM_NO_EVAL_CNT + QUIZ_NO_EVAL_CNT + TEST_NO_EVAL_CNT + RESCH_NO_EVAL_CNT) > 0

/* SQL ID : selectScoreZeroCnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) A WHERE (MID_NO_EVAL_CNT + LAST_NO_EVAL_CNT + ASMNT_NO_EVAL_CNT + FORUM_NO_EVAL_CNT + QUIZ_NO_EVAL_CNT + TEST_NO_EVAL_CNT + RESCH_NO_EVAL_CNT) > 0
mapper.sql: SELECT A.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN C ON A.EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND A.STD_ID IN ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_USR BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON AA.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N' )
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : selectReExamStdCnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM (
) A
/* SQL ID : selectReExamStd 설 명 : */

/* SQL ID : selectOverallBaseTchInfo 설 명 : */ SELECT X.CRSNM , X.SBJCT_ID , X.SBJCTNM , X.DVCLAS_NO , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(X.TCH_NM SEPARATOR ','), '-') AS TCH_NM , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(X.ASS_NM SEPARATOR ','), '-') AS ASS_NM FROM ( SELECT B.CRSNM , A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO , (CASE WHEN C.PROF_TYCD != 'ASSISTANT' THEN (SELECT X.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR X WHERE X.USER_ID = C.USER_ID) END) AS TCH_NM , (CASE WHEN C.PROF_TYCD = 'ASSISTANT' THEN (SELECT X.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR X WHERE X.USER_ID = C.USER_ID) END) AS ASS_NM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_CRS B ON (B.CRS_ID = A.CRS_ID) JOIN SBJCT_PROF C ON(C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND C.PROF_TYCD != 'MONITORING') WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) X GROUP BY X.CRSNM, X.SBJCT_ID

/* SQL ID : selectOverallBaseStdInfo 설 명 : */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID AS STD_USER_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID)) AS STD_USER_NM , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID)) AS STD_DEPT_NM , (SELECT MOBILE_NO FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID)) AS STD_MOBILE_NO , B.OBJCT_APLY_CTS , DATE_FORMAT(B.OBJCT_APLY_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s ') AS OBJT_DTTM_FMT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A LEFT OUTER JOIN MRK_OBJCT_APLY B ON (B.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) WHERE A.STD_ID = (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S') AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : selectScoreObjtCtnt 설 명 : */ SELECT OBJCT_APLY_CTS , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(OBJCT_APLY_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS OBJT_DTTM_FMT FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY WHERE MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID = #{scoreObjtCd}

/* SQL ID : selectScoreObjtRegInfo 설 명 : */ SELECT SBJCT_ID , DVCLAS_NO , SBJCTNM , FN_GET_ORG_CODE_NM(#{orgId}, 'CMCRS_GBNCD', CMCRS_GBNCD) AS COMP_DV_NM , CRS_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : selectScoreObjtRegList 설 명 : */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.USERNM) AS LINE_NO, A.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID, A.SCR_STSCD, (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID)) AS DEPTNM, (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) AS USER_ID, (SELECT X.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR X WHERE X.USER_ID = (SELECT XX.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT XX WHERE XX.STD_ID = A.STD_ID)) AS USERNM, FN_GET_ORG_CODE_NM(#{orgId}, 'CMCRS_GBNCD', D.CMCRS_GBNCD) AS COMP_DV_NM, A.TOT_SCR, A.SCR_GRDCD, D.SBJCTNM, D.DVCLAS_NO, D.CRS_ID, D.UNIV_CD, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ORDER BY A.STD_ID) AS RN FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT D ON D.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY X WHERE X.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND X.STD_ID = A.STD_ID ) ) WHERE RN = 1 ) A
WHERE ( A.USER_ID LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR A.DEPTNM LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR A.USERNM LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )

/* SQL ID : selectScoreObjtProcList 설 명 : */
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY X.TOT_SCR DESC) AS LINE_NO, NVL(S.SCYR, '-') AS SCYR, Y.CHG_RSN, NVL(Y.CHG_PROC_CD, '1') AS CHG_PROC_CD, Y.CHGBFR_SCR, Y.OBJCT_APLY_CTS, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(Y.OBJCT_APLY_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS OBJT_DTTM_FMT, X.*, U.DEPTNM, U.USER_ID, U.USERNM, U.COMP_DV_NM FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY B.TOT_SCR DESC) AS RNK_NO, B.STD_ID, D.SBJCT_ID, B.SCR_STSCD, B.TOT_SCR, B.ADTN_SCR, B.EXCH_TOT_SCR, NVL(B.SCR_GRDCD, '-') AS SCR_GRDCD, MAX(CASE WHEN D.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN C.ACQS_SCR ELSE NULL END) AS LESSON_SCORE, MAX(CASE WHEN D.MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1' THEN D.MRK_RFLTRT ELSE NULL END) AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT B JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM C ON C.STD_ID = B.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF D ON D.SCR_ITM_ID = C.SCR_ITM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT E ON E.SBJCT_ID = D.SBJCT_ID WHERE D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} GROUP BY B.STD_ID, D.SBJCT_ID, B.SCR_STSCD, B.TOT_SCR, B.ADTN_SCR, B.EXCH_TOT_SCR, B.SCR_GRDCD ) X LEFT JOIN MRK_OBJCT_APLY Y ON Y.SBJCT_ID = X.SBJCT_ID AND Y.STD_ID = X.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S ON S.SBJCT_ID = X.SBJCT_ID AND S.STD_ID = X.STD_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT S.STD_ID, UI.DEPTNM, UI.USER_ID, UI.USERNM, FN_GET_ORG_CODE_NM(#{orgId}, 'CMCRS_GBNCD', C.CMCRS_GBNCD) AS COMP_DV_NM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S JOIN TB_LMS_USR UI ON S.USER_ID = UI.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON S.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID ) U ON X.STD_ID = U.STD_ID

/* SQL ID : selectStdScorePrvInfo 설 명 : */ SELECT A.STD_ID , NVL((SELECT CHGBFR_SCR FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID), A.TOT_SCR) AS CHGBFR_SCR , NVL((SELECT CHGBFR_GRDCD FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID), A.SCR_GRDCD) AS CHGBFR_GRDCD FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A WHERE A.STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : selectRelativePrvGrade 설 명 : */ SELECT A.SCR_GRDCD FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT D ON (D.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID) WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.TOT_SCR >= #{prvScore} GROUP BY A.STD_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ORDER BY A.TOT_SCR ASC LIMIT 1

/* SQL ID : selectRelativeMaxGrade 설 명 : */ SELECT A.SCR_GRDCD FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT D ON (D.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID) WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.TOT_SCR = ( SELECT MAX(A.TOT_SCR) FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT D ON (D.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID) WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} GROUP BY C.SBJCT_ID ) AND A.TOT_SCR < #{prvScore} LIMIT 1
/* SQL ID : selectStdMemo 설 명 : */ SELECT SCR_MEMO FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : selectCurDateFmt 설 명 : */ SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CUR_DATE_FMT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AS CUR_YEAR , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'MM') AS CUR_MONTH , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD') AS CUR_DAY FROM DUAL
/* SQL ID : selectLessonTotCnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : selectLessonAbsentTotCnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND ( A.LCTR_WKNO_GBNCD IN ('02', '03') -- 세미나 주차 포함 OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS AA WHERE AA.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND ( AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO' OR ( AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO_LINK' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = AA.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID) ) ) AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.PRG_RFLTYN = 'Y' ) ) AND NVL(B.ATNDLC_STSCD, 'NOSTUDY') IN ('STUDY', 'NOSTUDY')

/* SQL ID : selectLessonLateTotCnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND ( A.LCTR_WKNO_GBNCD IN ('02', '03') -- 세미나 주차 포함 OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS AA WHERE AA.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND ( AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO' OR ( AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO_LINK' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = AA.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID) ) ) AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.PRG_RFLTYN = 'Y' ) ) AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'LATE'

/* SQL ID : selectTestsDtlList 설 명 : */ SELECT XX.* , ROUND((XX.SCR/100) * XX.MRK_RFLTRT, 2) AS SCORE_AVG FROM ( SELECT A.EXAM_ID AS TYPE_CD , A.EXAM_TTL AS TYPE_NM , A.MRK_RFLTRT , NVL((CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N') = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END ELSE ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN ( SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN ( SELECT X.SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN X WHERE X.ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN ( SELECT X.SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP X WHERE X.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) END), 0) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON (A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID) WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = #{examStareTypeCd} AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) XX

/* SQL ID : selectQuizDtlList 설 명 : */ SELECT XX.* , ROUND((XX.SCR/100) * XX.MRK_RFLTRT, 2) AS SCORE_AVG FROM ( SELECT A.EXAM_ID AS TYPE_CD , A.EXAM_TTL AS TYPE_NM , A.MRK_RFLTRT , NVL(( SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo}),0) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON (A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID) WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' ) XX

/* SQL ID : selectTestDtlList 설 명 : */ SELECT XX.* , ROUND((XX.SCR/100) * XX.MRK_RFLTRT, 2) AS SCORE_AVG FROM ( SELECT A.EXAM_ID AS TYPE_CD , A.EXAM_TTL AS TYPE_NM , A.MRK_RFLTRT , NVL((CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN ( SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN ( SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) END), 0) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON (A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID) WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) XX

/* SQL ID : selectAsmntDtlList 설 명 : */ SELECT A.ASMT_ID AS TYPE_CD , A.ASMT_TTL AS TYPE_NM , A.MRK_RFLTRT , NVL(B.SCR,0) AS SCR , ROUND((NVL(B.SCR,0)/100) * A.MRK_RFLTRT, 2) AS SCORE_AVG FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN B ON (A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID) WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ASMT_CTGRCD NOT IN ('SUBS', 'EXAM')

/* SQL ID : selectForumDtlList 설 명 : */ SELECT A.DSCS_ID AS TYPE_CD , A.DSCS_TTL AS TYPE_NM , A.MRK_RFLTRT , NVL(B.SCR,0) AS SCR , ROUND((NVL(B.SCR,0)/100) * A.MRK_RFLTRT, 2) AS SCORE_AVG FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP B ON (A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.DSCS_TYCD NOT IN ('SUBS', 'EXAM')

/* SQL ID : selectObjtProcCfmInfo 설 명 : */ SELECT A.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , B.DVCLAS_NO , B.SBJCTNM , FN_GET_ORG_CODE_NM(#{orgId}, 'CMCRS_GBNCD', B.CMCRS_GBNCD) AS COMP_DV_NM , A.STD_ID , A.OBJCT_APLYR_ID , (SELECT X.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR X WHERE X.USER_ID = A.OBJCT_APLYR_ID) AS OBJT_USER_NM , A.OBJCT_APLY_CTS , TO_CHAR(A.OBJCT_APLY_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s ') AS OBJT_DTTM_FMT , A.CHGR_ID , (SELECT X.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR X WHERE X.USER_ID = A.CHGR_ID) AS PROC_USER_NM , A.CHG_RSN , TO_CHAR(A.CHG_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s ') AS PROC_DTTM_FMT , A.CHGBFR_SCR , A.CHGBFR_GRDCD , A.CHGBFR_SCR , A.CHGBFR_GRDCD , A.CHG_PROC_CD , ( CASE WHEN A.CHG_PROC_CD = '1' THEN '승인(가산점부여)' WHEN A.CHG_PROC_CD = '2' THEN '확인(가산점미부여)' WHEN A.CHG_PROC_CD = '3' THEN '반려(가산점미부여)' ELSE '신청' END ) AS PROC_NM FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT B ON(A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID) WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : selectStdCnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS TOT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON (B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID) WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND B.SCHREG_GBN_CD IN ('01','02','20')
/* SQL ID : selectMrksList 설 명 : */ SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : selectAbsoluteBaseInfo 설 명 : */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , B.MRK_EVL_TYCD , A.UNIV_CD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_CRE_CRS_EVAL B ON (A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID) WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : selectAbsoluteCalc 설 명 : */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'A+' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '4.5' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 95 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 100 AS MRKS_TO_SCR UNION ALL SELECT 'A' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '4.0' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 90 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 94 AS MRKS_TO_SCR UNION ALL SELECT 'B+' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '3.5' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 85 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 89 AS MRKS_TO_SCR UNION ALL SELECT 'B' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '3.0' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 80 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 84 AS MRKS_TO_SCR UNION ALL SELECT 'C+' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '2.5' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 75 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 79 AS MRKS_TO_SCR UNION ALL SELECT 'C' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '2.0' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 70 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 74 AS MRKS_TO_SCR UNION ALL SELECT 'D+' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '1.5' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 65 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 69 AS MRKS_TO_SCR UNION ALL SELECT 'D' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '1.0' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 60 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 64 AS MRKS_TO_SCR UNION ALL SELECT 'F' AS MRKS_GRD_GBN , '0.0' AS DRVTN_GRDCD , 0 AS MRKS_FR_SCR , 59 AS MRKS_TO_SCR ) A WHERE IF(TRUNCATE(#{flExchScr}, 0) = -1, 0, TRUNCATE(#{flExchScr}, 0)) BETWEEN A.MRKS_FR_SCR AND A.MRKS_TO_SCR
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : updateOverallScoreInit 설 명 : */ UPDATE TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT SET TOT_SCR = 0 , LST_SCR = 0 , SCR_GRDCD = NULL , ADTN_SCR = 0 , SCR_STSCD = 2 , EXCH_SCR_MID_TEST = 0 , EXCH_SCR_LAST_TEST = 0 , EXCH_SCR_ASMNT = 0 , DRVTN_SCR_LRN_PRGRT = 0 , EXCH_SCR_FORUM = 0 , EXCH_SCR_TEST = 0 , EXCH_SCR_QUIZ = 0 , EXCH_TOT_SCR = 0 , DRVTN_GRDCD = 0 , EXCH_GAP_SCR = 0 WHERE STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S')
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : selectLmsLessonScore 설 명 : */ SELECT CASE WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR IN ('10', '20') THEN FN_SCOR_LATE_DMARK_SCR(A.LESSON_SCHEDULE_CNT, FN_SCOR_ATTEND_DETM_SCR(A.LESSON_SCHEDULE_CNT, A.COMPLETE_CNT + A.LATE_CNT), A.LATE_CNT) WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR IN ('11', '21') THEN FN_SCOR_ATTEND_DETM_SCR(A.LESSON_SCHEDULE_CNT, A.COMPLETE_CNT + A.LATE_CNT) END AS SCR FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID , A.DGRS_SMSTR , COUNT(A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.ATNDLC_STSCD IN ('COMPLETE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS COMPLETE_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.ATNDLC_STSCD IN ('LATE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS LATE_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID , B.DGRS_SMSTR , B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , B.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , C.ATNDLC_STSCD FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , C.DGRS_SMSTR FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN CRS_SMSTR C ON B.CRS_SMSTR_ID = C.CRS_SMSTR_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ( A.LCTR_WKNO_GBNCD IN ('02', '03') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS AA WHERE AA.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND ( AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO' OR ( AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO_LINK' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = AA.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID) ) ) AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.PRG_RFLTYN = 'Y' ) ) ) B LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE C ON A.STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID ) A GROUP BY A.USER_ID, A.STD_ID, A.DGRS_SMSTR ) A

/* SQL ID : selectLmsTestsScore 설 명 : */ SELECT XX.SCR AS SCR FROM ( SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_TTL , A.MRK_RFLTRT , (CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N') = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END ELSE ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END) AS SCR , A.DELYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.TKEXAM_TYCD = #{examStareTypeCd} AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) XX

/* SQL ID : selectLmsAsmntScore 설 명 : */ SELECT SUM(ROUND((B.SCR/100) * A.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN B ON (A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.EVLYN = 'Y') WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.ASMT_CTGRCD NOT IN ('SUBS', 'EXAM') AND A.DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : selectLmsForumScore 설 명 : */ SELECT SUM(ROUND((B.SCR/100) * A.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP B ON (A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.EVLYN = 'Y') WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DSCS_TYCD NOT IN ('SUBS', 'EXAM') AND A.DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : selectLmsReshScore 설 명 : */ SELECT SUM(ROUND((C.SCR/100) * A.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP C ON A.SRVY_ID = C.SRVY_ID AND C.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND C.EVLYN = 'Y' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.SRVY_TYCD = 'LECT'

/* SQL ID : selectLmsQuizScore 설 명 : */ SELECT SUM(ROUND((XX.SCR/100) * XX.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)) AS SCR FROM ( SELECT NVL((SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND X.DELYN = 'N' AND X.EVLYN = 'Y'), 0) AS SCR , A.MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON (A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID) WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) XX

/* SQL ID : selectLmsTestScore 설 명 : */ SELECT NVL(SUM(ROUND((XX.SCR/100) * XX.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)), 0) AS SCR FROM ( SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_TTL , A.MRK_RFLTRT , NVL((CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN ( SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND X.DELYN = 'N' AND X.EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN ( SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND X.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND X.DELYN = 'N' AND X.EVLYN = 'Y') END), 0) AS SCR , A.DELYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON (A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID) WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) XX
mapper.delete: /* SQL ID : deleteOverallScoreInit 설 명 : */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd})
/* SQL ID : deleteOverallScoreItemInit 설 명 : */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM WHERE SCR_ITM_ID IN ( SELECT X.SCR_ITM_ID FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF X WHERE X.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : selectScoreOverallStd 설 명 : */ SELECT LST_SCR -- 총점 , SCR_GRDCD -- 평점 , TOT_SCR -- 총점 , DRVTN_SCR_LRN_PRGRT -- 출석/강의 , EXCH_SCR_MID_TEST -- 중간 , EXCH_SCR_LAST_TEST -- 기말 , EXCH_SCR_TEST -- 상시시험 , EXCH_SCR_ASMNT -- 과제 , EXCH_SCR_FORUM -- 토론 , EXCH_SCR_QUIZ -- 퀴즈 , EXCH_SCR_RESH -- 설문 , EXCH_TOT_SCR , ADTN_SCR , DRVTN_GRDCD , EXCH_GAP_SCR , RNK , RNK_QUOTA , RNK_TRGTYN , CAL_SCR_MID_TEST , CAL_SCR_LAST_TEST , CAL_SCR_ASMNT , CNVS_SCR_LRN_PRGRT , CAL_SCR_FORUM , CAL_SCR_TEST , CAL_SCR_QUIZ , CAL_SCR_RESH , CAL_TOT_SCR , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE SRVY_CTGRCD = 'RSCT_211110T1524488f10010' AND FN_DTTM() BETWEEN SRVY_SDTTM AND RESCH_END_DTTM AND SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND SRVY_TYCD = 'EVAL' AND SRVY_ID IN (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd})), 0) AS evalReschCnt , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SRVY_ID IN (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE SRVY_CTGRCD = 'RSCT_211110T1524488f10010' AND FN_DTTM() BETWEEN SRVY_SDTTM AND RESCH_END_DTTM AND SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND SRVY_TYCD = 'EVAL' AND SRVY_ID IN (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}))), 0) AS evalReschJoinCnt FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S')

/* SQL ID : selectOverallModStdInfo 설 명 : */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID AS STD_USER_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID)) AS STD_USER_NM , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID)) AS STD_DEPT_NM , (SELECT MOBILE_NO FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID)) AS STD_MOBILE_NO , B.OBJCT_APLY_CTS , DATE_FORMAT(B.OBJCT_APLY_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s ') AS OBJT_DTTM_FMT , B.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A LEFT OUTER JOIN MRK_OBJCT_APLY B ON (B.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) WHERE B.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID = #{scoreObjtCd}
/* SQL ID : selectScoreItemConfList 설 명 : */ SELECT SBJCT_ID , MRK_TYCD , MRK_ITMNM , MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : selectStdScoreObjt 설 명 : */ SELECT MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID , SBJCT_ID , STD_ID , OBJCT_APLYR_ID , OBJCT_APLY_CTS , OBJCT_APLY_DTTM , CHGR_ID , CHG_RSN , CHG_DTTM , CHGBFR_SCR , CHGBFR_GRDCD , CHGBFR_SCR , CHGBFR_GRDCD , CHG_PROC_CD , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND STD_ID = (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{objtUserId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N')

/* SQL ID : selectBtnStatus 설 명 : */ SELECT A.SCR_STSCD , CASE WHEN A.SCR_STSCD = '2' OR A.SCR_STSCD = '3' THEN ( SELECT MAX(FRST_INQ_DTTM) FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT_DTL WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND ( CHG_CTS LIKE '%LMS데이터%' OR CHG_CTS LIKE '%평가점수%' ) ) ELSE NULL END AS INIT_DTTM , CASE WHEN A.SCR_STSCD = '3' THEN ( SELECT MAX(FRST_INQ_DTTM) FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT_DTL WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND ( CHG_CTS = '[성적환산:상대평가]' OR CHG_CTS = '[성적환산:절대평가]' OR CHG_CTS = '[성적환산:PF]') ) ELSE NULL END AS CAL_DTTM FROM ( SELECT C.SBJCT_ID , MIN(A.SCR_STSCD) AS SCR_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON (B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON (C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON (D.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND D.AUDITYN = 'N' AND D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON (D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID) GROUP BY C.SBJCT_ID ) A

/* SQL ID : selectScoreHistList 설 명 : */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO , A.MRK_SBJCT_DTL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS USERNM , A.CHG_CTS , A.CHG_DTTM , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT_DTL A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
AND ( A.USER_ID LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )

/* SQL ID : selectInvalidRatioCntQuiz 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , ( SELECT SUM(NVL(AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 0)) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND NVL(AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN, 'N') IN ('Y', 'M') ) AS MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) ) A WHERE MRK_RFLTRT IS NULL OR MRK_RFLTRT != 100

/* SQL ID : selectInvalidRatioCntForum 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , ( SELECT SUM(NVL(AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 0)) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AA WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.DSCS_TYCD NOT IN ('EXAM', 'SUBS') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID ) AS MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_TYCD = 'FORUM' AND MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) ) A WHERE MRK_RFLTRT IS NULL OR MRK_RFLTRT != 100

/* SQL ID : selectInvalidRatioCntAsmnt 설 명 : */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , ( SELECT SUM(NVL(AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 0)) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.ASMT_CTGRCD NOT IN ('EXAM', 'SUBS') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID ) AS MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_TYCD = 'ASSIGNMENT' AND MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) ) A WHERE MRK_RFLTRT IS NULL OR MRK_RFLTRT != 100

/* SQL ID : selectOriginScoreItem 설 명 : */ SELECT CASE WHEN B.ACQS_SCR = -1 THEN '-' ELSE B.ACQS_SCR END AS ACQS_SCR FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM B ON B.STD_ID = A.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF C ON C.SCR_ITM_ID = B.SCR_ITM_ID AND C.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT D ON D.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.MRK_ITM_SEQ = #{scoreItemOrder} AND B.ACQS_SCR != #{modScore}

/* SQL ID : selectScoreExistsYnByUniCd 설 명 : */ SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND C.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} AND C.CRS_ID NOT LIKE 'LEG%' AND C.CRS_ID NOT LIKE 'TEST%' AND C.UNIV_CD = 'C' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SCORE_EXISTS_YN_C , CASE WHEN EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND C.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} AND C.CRS_ID NOT LIKE 'LEG%' AND C.CRS_ID NOT LIKE 'TEST%' AND C.UNIV_CD = 'G' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SCORE_EXISTS_YN_G
