/* SQL ID : selectOverallExamNoStareStdList 설 명 : */ SELECT A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID , B.USERNM FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID -- 중간고사 응시 , NVL(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXAM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE EXAM ON AA.EXAM_ID = EXAM.EXAM_ID AND EXAM.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM.STARE_CNT > 0 AND EXAM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ), 0) -- 중간고사 대체 응시 + NVL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN CASE WHEN QUIZ.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN CASE WHEN ASMNT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN CASE WHEN FORUM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE QUIZ ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_ID AND QUIZ.DELYN = 'N' AND QUIZ.STARE_CNT > 0 AND QUIZ.STD_ID = A.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN ASMNT ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID AND ASMNT.DELYN = 'N' AND ASMNT.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND ASMNT.STD_ID = A.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP FORUM ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND FORUM.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND FORUM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD IN ('QUIZ', 'ASMNT', 'FORUM') AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ), 0) -- 중간고사 재시험 응시 + NVL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN QUIZ.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN ASMNT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN FORUM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE QUIZ ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_ID AND QUIZ.DELYN = 'N' AND QUIZ.STARE_CNT > 0 AND QUIZ.STD_ID = A.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN ASMNT ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID AND ASMNT.DELYN = 'N' AND ASMNT.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND ASMNT.STD_ID = A.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP FORUM ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND FORUM.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND FORUM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y') ), 0) AS MID_STARE_CNT -- 기말고사 응시 , NVL(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXAM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE EXAM ON AA.EXAM_ID = EXAM.EXAM_ID AND EXAM.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM.STARE_CNT > 0 AND EXAM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ), 0) -- 기말고사 대체 응시 + IFNULL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN CASE WHEN QUIZ.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN CASE WHEN ASMNT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN CASE WHEN FORUM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE QUIZ ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_ID AND QUIZ.DELYN = 'N' AND QUIZ.STARE_CNT > 0 AND QUIZ.STD_ID = A.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN ASMNT ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID AND ASMNT.DELYN = 'N' AND ASMNT.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND ASMNT.STD_ID = A.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP FORUM ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND FORUM.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND FORUM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD IN ('QUIZ', 'ASMNT', 'FORUM') AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ), 0) -- 기말고사 재시험 응시 + NVL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN QUIZ.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN ASMNT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN CASE WHEN FORUM.STD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE QUIZ ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_ID AND QUIZ.DELYN = 'N' AND QUIZ.STARE_CNT > 0 AND QUIZ.STD_ID = A.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN ASMNT ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID AND ASMNT.DELYN = 'N' AND ASMNT.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND ASMNT.STD_ID = A.STD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP FORUM ON AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND FORUM.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = FORUM.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AND FORUM.STD_ID = A.STD_ID WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y') ), 0) AS LAST_STARE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' ) A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE NVL(A.MID_STARE_CNT, 0) + NVL(A.LAST_STARE_CNT, 0) = 0

/* SQL ID : selectOverallInitScoreList 설 명 : */ WITH LESSON_T AS ( SELECT A.STD_ID , CASE WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR IN ('10', '20') THEN FN_SCOR_LATE_DMARK_SCR(A.LESSON_SCHEDULE_CNT, FN_SCOR_ATTEND_DETM_SCR(A.LESSON_SCHEDULE_CNT, A.COMPLETE_CNT + A.LATE_CNT), A.LATE_CNT) WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR IN ('11', '21') THEN FN_SCOR_ATTEND_DETM_SCR(A.LESSON_SCHEDULE_CNT, A.COMPLETE_CNT + A.LATE_CNT) END AS SCR FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID , A.DGRS_SMSTR , COUNT(A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.ATNDLC_STSCD IN ('COMPLETE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS COMPLETE_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.ATNDLC_STSCD IN ('LATE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS LATE_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID , B.DGRS_SMSTR , B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , B.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , C.ATNDLC_STSCD FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , C.DGRS_SMSTR FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN CRS_SMSTR C ON B.CRS_SMSTR_ID = C.CRS_SMSTR_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ( A.LCTR_WKNO_GBNCD IN ('02', '03') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS AA WHERE AA.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND ( AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO' OR ( AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO_LINK' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = AA.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID) ) ) AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.PRG_RFLTYN = 'Y' ) ) ) B LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE C ON A.STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID ) A GROUP BY A.USER_ID, A.STD_ID, A.DGRS_SMSTR ) A ) SELECT A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID , B.USERNM , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS USERNM , A.LESSON_SCORE , A.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE , A.LAST_TEST_SCORE , A.TEST_SCORE , A.ASMNT_SCORE , A.FORUM_SCORE , A.QUIZ_SCORE , A.RESCH_SCORE , A.CNVS_SCR_LRN_PRGRT , A.CAL_SCR_MID_TEST , A.CAL_SCR_LAST_TEST , A.CAL_SCR_TEST , A.CAL_SCR_ASMNT , A.CAL_SCR_FORUM , A.CAL_SCR_QUIZ , A.CAL_SCR_RESH , ( NVL(A.CNVS_SCR_LRN_PRGRT, 0) + NVL(A.CAL_SCR_MID_TEST, 0) + NVL(A.CAL_SCR_LAST_TEST, 0) + NVL(A.CAL_SCR_TEST, 0) + NVL(A.CAL_SCR_ASMNT, 0) + NVL(A.CAL_SCR_FORUM, 0) + NVL(A.CAL_SCR_QUIZ, 0) + NVL(A.CAL_SCR_RESH, 0) ) AS CAL_TOT_SCR FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.LESSON_SCORE , A.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE , A.LAST_TEST_SCORE , A.TEST_SCORE , A.ASMNT_SCORE , A.FORUM_SCORE , A.QUIZ_SCORE , A.RESCH_SCORE , ROUND((CAST(A.LESSON_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(LESSON_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS CNVS_SCR_LRN_PRGRT , ROUND((CAST(A.MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS CAL_SCR_MID_TEST , ROUND((CAST(A.LAST_TEST_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS CAL_SCR_LAST_TEST , ROUND((CAST(A.TEST_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(TEST_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS CAL_SCR_TEST , ROUND((CAST(A.ASMNT_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS CAL_SCR_ASMNT , ROUND((CAST(A.FORUM_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(FORUM_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS CAL_SCR_FORUM , ROUND((CAST(A.QUIZ_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS CAL_SCR_QUIZ , ROUND((CAST(A.RESCH_SCORE AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) / 100) * CAST(RESH_SCORE_RATIO AS DECIMAL(5, 2)), 2) AS CAL_SCR_RESH FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID -- 1.출석 , (SELECT SCR FROM LESSON_T WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) AS LESSON_SCORE -- 2.중간 , ( SELECT (CASE WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END ELSE ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID WHERE AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE -- 3.기말 , ( SELECT (CASE WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END ELSE ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN ( SELECT ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'ASMNT' THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'FORUM' THEN ( SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y') END) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID WHERE AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) AS LAST_TEST_SCORE -- 4. 수시 , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(ROUND((XX.SCR/100) * XX.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)), 0) AS SCR FROM ( SELECT AA.MRK_RFLTRT , NVL(( CASE WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN ( SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_ID AND X.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND X.DELYN = 'N' AND X.EVLYN = 'Y') WHEN AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' THEN ( SELECT X.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE X WHERE X.EXAM_ID = AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND X.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND X.DELYN = 'N' AND X.EVLYN = 'Y') END ), 0) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID WHERE AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) XX ) AS TEST_SCORE -- 5. 과제 , ( SELECT SUM(ROUND((BB.SCR/100) * AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN BB ON AA.ASMT_ID = BB.ASMT_ID AND BB.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.EVLYN = 'Y' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.ASMT_CTGRCD NOT IN ('SUBS', 'EXAM') AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) AS ASMNT_SCORE -- 6. 토론 , ( SELECT SUM(ROUND((BB.SCR/100) * AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AA JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP BB ON AA.DSCS_ID = BB.DSCS_ID AND BB.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.EVLYN = 'Y' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.DSCS_TYCD NOT IN ('SUBS', 'EXAM') AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) AS FORUM_SCORE -- 7. 퀴즈 , ( SELECT SUM(ROUND((CC.ACQS_TOT_SCR/100) * AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE CC ON AA.EXAM_ID = CC.EXAM_ID AND CC.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND CC.DELYN = 'N' AND CC.EVLYN = 'Y' WHERE AA.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND AA.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) AS QUIZ_SCORE -- 8.설문 , ( SELECT SUM(ROUND((CC.SCR/100) * AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 2)) AS SCR FROM TB_LMS_SRVY AA JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.SRVY_ID = BB.SRVY_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP CC ON AA.SRVY_ID = CC.SRVY_ID AND CC.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND CC.EVLYN = 'Y' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.SRVY_TYCD = 'LECT' ) AS RESCH_SCORE , (SELECT MAX(MRK_RFLTRT) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = '1') AS LESSON_SCORE_RATIO , (SELECT MAX(MRK_RFLTRT) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = '2') AS MIDDLE_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , (SELECT MAX(MRK_RFLTRT) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = '3') AS LAST_TEST_SCORE_RATIO , (SELECT MAX(MRK_RFLTRT) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = '4') AS TEST_SCORE_RATIO , (SELECT MAX(MRK_RFLTRT) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = '5') AS ASSIGNMENT_SCORE_RATIO , (SELECT MAX(MRK_RFLTRT) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = '6') AS FORUM_SCORE_RATIO , (SELECT MAX(MRK_RFLTRT) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = '7') AS QUIZ_SCORE_RATIO , (SELECT MAX(MRK_RFLTRT) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_ITM_SEQ = '8') AS RESH_SCORE_RATIO FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' ) A ) A
